inputs.label: Volume in Cubic Inches
inputs.businessContext: The volume measurement in cubic inches to be converted to cubic centimeters.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The standard conversion factor from cubic inches to cubic centimeters (1 in³ = 16.387064 cm³).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the rounded output.

formulas.cubicCm: roundingMode === 0 ? Math.round(exactCubicCm * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : roundingMode === 1 ? Math.floor(exactCubicCm * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : Math.ceil(exactCubicCm * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
